profile_summary: Solo traveler (mid budget) prioritizing local culture, central location, safety.

recommendations.justification: Hotel Belmont, Mexico City ranks #1 for this traveler on local culture (+0.86), central location (+0.82), safety (+0.65), weighted by what matters most to them. Guests note: "On-site restaurant was a highlight — beautifully prepared local dishes."

supporting_evidence.quote: On-site restaurant was a highlight — beautifully prepared local dishes.
As a solo traveler I felt very secure here, both in the hotel and the surrounding streets.
Felt completely safe walking back alone at night; the area is well-lit and security was attentive.

recommendations.justification: The Royal Solana, Lima ranks #3 for this traveler on local culture (+0.67), central location (+0.83), safety (+0.61), weighted by what matters most to them. Guests note: "Slept beautifully — very quiet despite being central."

supporting_evidence.quote: Slept beautifully — very quiet despite being central.
On-site restaurant was a highlight — beautifully prepared local dishes.

recommendations.justification: Hotel del Aurora, San Francisco ranks #4 for this traveler on local culture (+0.66), central location (+0.75), safety (+0.60), weighted by what matters most to them. Guests note: "Perfect central location, walking distance to all the main sights."

supporting_evidence.quote: Perfect central location, walking distance to all the main sights.
Great base for experiencing the real culture — artisans and street food all around.
Loved that it sat in a genuine local neighborhood, not a tourist bubble.
